description: Single source of truth for all rational bound pins used in MRS infer obligations and Python PINNED dicts. Each entry maps an obligation_id to its certified rational bound with provenance.

moment_tolerance_ok.note: Theorem B moment L2 distance; measured 0.000704

grid_rel_gap_bounded.note: Hadamard grid relative gap; measured ~0.0258; bound 0.03; NumericInterval only, NOT exact equality

t1_uniform_resolvent_lb.note: Uniform resolvent lower bound inf_p R_p(theta0) >= 1098/1000000 > 0; PROVED unconditionally via elementary tail bound (log p >= 2*theta0 => R_p >= theta0) + finite cert over the 9651 primes below e^{2*theta0}; minimizer p=317, j=1; no Baker effective constant. See tools/Analysis/EmitT1UniformResolventCert.py

ym_finite_volume_gap_uniform_lb.note: Volume-uniform finite-volume YM transfer-gap floor inf_V Delta(V) >= beta*g/pi^2 = 2.07904 > 0; the heat-kernel (spectral) channel beta*g/pi^2 is volume-independent and dominates the decaying plaquette channel beta/(2 L^2). Backs ym_finite_volume_gap_uniform ONLY; does NOT close os_continuum_tightness_hypothesis or gap_lower_semicontinuity_hypothesis (the two named open continuum cores). See tools/Analysis/EmitYMFiniteVolumeGapCert.py

semantic_note: NumericInterval bounds like grid_rel_gap_bounded certify |det-C*xi| < tol on the approach grid. They are interval bounds, not exact transcendental equalities. Exact equality requires det_zeta_zero_set_equals_xi_zeros (STRUCTURAL_PIN).
